metadata.purpose: Context lifecycle, handoff packet schema, compression policy, and token budget rules for AI-driven execution

handoffPacketSchema.field: New files with paths and line counts

compressionRules.rule: Before starting any new phase, run /compact to reset context.
Load ONLY the handoff packet from previous phase, not the full transcript.
Load ONLY the plan documents relevant to the current workstream (not all 15).
Use Grep/Glob for targeted file access. Never read entire source files unless necessary.
Subagents handle exploration. Main context handles decisions and writes.
If context exceeds 60K tokens mid-phase, create intermediate handoff and restart.

pinnedContext.pin: Key files: src/lib.rs (orchestration), src/mir.rs (MIR), src/typeck.rs (type checker)
Pipeline: Lexer -> Parser -> AST -> TypeChecker -> TAST -> MIR -> Passes -> LLVM IR -> clang
Syntax: val/var, model, extend, : (return type), . (path separator), |> (pipe)

stage.name: SessionInit
stage.description: Load minimal context: handoff packet, relevant plan documents, pinned context.

stage.name: Exploration
stage.description: Use subagents and targeted searches to gather information. Do not load full files into main context.

stage.name: Implementation
stage.description: Write code, run tests, iterate. This is the bulk of the token budget.

stage.name: Validation
stage.description: Run full test suite, verify acceptance criteria, prepare handoff.

stage.name: Handoff
stage.description: Create handoff packet, summarize session, list next actions.

antiPattern.name: FullFileLoading
antiPattern.description: Reading entire large source files (e.g., parser.rs at 2100+ lines) into context when only a specific function is needed.
antiPattern.remedy: Use Grep to find the specific function, then Read with offset/limit to load only the relevant section.

antiPattern.name: MultiWorkstreamSession
antiPattern.description: Attempting to implement features from multiple workstreams in a single session.
antiPattern.remedy: Stick to one workstream per session. Create handoff packet before switching.

antiPattern.name: DeferredTesting
antiPattern.description: Writing implementation code without immediately writing corresponding tests.
antiPattern.remedy: Write tests alongside or before implementation code. Never defer tests to a later session.

antiPattern.name: SilentFailure
antiPattern.description: Proceeding past a test failure or compilation warning without addressing it.
antiPattern.remedy: Stop immediately. Fix the issue. Verify the fix. Only then continue with new work.

antiPattern.name: StaleContext
antiPattern.description: Continuing work based on assumptions from earlier in the context that may no longer be accurate.
antiPattern.remedy: Re-verify file state with targeted reads before making changes that depend on earlier assumptions.
